text: うむ、君の答えはわかっていたぞ。

メディオラは広いが、
今回の目標は、その外郭第２区だ。

スティアは深部に行くほど、
強力なエネミーが増えていく。

“ドレッドエネミー”の相手は、
想像を絶するだろう。

俺たちも、
決死の覚悟で戦いに臨むつもりだ。

だが、君の協力があれば、
必ずうまくいくはずだ。
I already knew what you were going to say.
Mediola is vast, but this time we're focusing on Outer Area 2.
The deeper into Stia you get, the more powerful the enemies are.
And they just never seem to end...
I can't even imagine how powerful a Dread Enemy there must be...
Of course, we're going in fully prepared to die.
But, if we have you by our side, I have no doubt that that won't happen.
